exercises.title: 的 de possessive / Modifier Marker
exercises.description: Fill in the blanks with appropriate words.

questions.question: 他 __________ 是馬安同。
questions.explanation: His name is Ma Antong. '他' (he) + '的' (possessive) + '名字' (name).

questions.question: 陳先生 __________ 姓李。
questions.explanation: Mr. Chen's teacher's surname is Li.

questions.question: 我 __________ 是老師。
questions.explanation: My younger sister is a teacher.

questions.question: __________ 爸爸來不來？
questions.explanation: Is your (plural) dad coming?

questions.question: __________ 家很漂亮嗎？
questions.explanation: Is your house very pretty?

exercises.title: Rearrange Characters (Modifier Marker)
exercises.description: Make correct sentences by rearranging the order of the characters.

questions.question: 人(1) 很好看(2) 的(3) -> __________ 多不多？
questions.explanation: 很好看(2) + 的(3) + 人(1) = 很好看的人 (good-looking people).

questions.question: 的(1) 好喝(2) 茶(3) -> 王老師要 __________ 。
questions.explanation: 好喝(2) + 的(1) + 茶(3) = 好喝的茶 (good-tasting tea).

questions.question: 好看(1) 照片(2) 的(3) -> 我沒有很多 __________ 。
questions.explanation: 好看(1) + 的(3) + 照片(2) = 好看的照片 (good-looking photos).

questions.question: 房子(1) 漂亮(2) 的(3) -> 我喜歡 __________ 。
questions.explanation: 漂亮(2) + 的(3) + 房子(1) = 漂亮的房子 (pretty houses).

questions.question: 的(1) 照片(2) 很多(3) 好看(4) -> 他有 __________ 。
questions.explanation: 很多(3) + 好看(4) + 的(1) + 照片(2) = 很多好看的照片 (many good-looking photos).

exercises.title: Rearrange Characters (Sentences)
exercises.description: Make correct sentences by rearranging the order of the chunks.

questions.question: 很多(1) 我們(2) 好喝的咖啡(3) 有(4) -> __________________ 。
questions.answer: 我們有很多好喝的咖啡

questions.question: 我哥哥(1) 漂亮的照片(2) 有(3) 沒(4) -> __________________ 。
questions.answer: 我哥哥沒有漂亮的照片

questions.question: 你是老師，他是老師。 -> 你們 __________ 。
questions.explanation: You are both teachers. 你們 (you plural) + 都 (all/both) + 是老師 (are teachers).

questions.question: 我喜歡喝咖啡，他喜歡喝咖啡。 -> 我們 __________ 。
questions.explanation: We both like to drink coffee.

questions.question: 你沒有兄弟姐妹，你的老師沒有兄弟姐妹。 -> 你們 __________ 。
questions.explanation: Neither of you has siblings.

questions.question: 你不要照相，他不要照相。 -> 你們 __________ 。
questions.explanation: Neither of you wants to take pictures.

exercises.title: Measures 個 ge and 張 zhāng
exercises.description: Place numbers and measure words in the blanks based on the nouns.

questions.question: 一 __________ 人
questions.explanation: 個 (ge) is the general measure word for people.

questions.question: __________ __________ 房子 (2 houses)
questions.explanation: 兩 (liǎng) is used for 'two' with measure words. 個 (ge) is used for houses here.

questions.question: __________ __________ 照片 (2 photos)
questions.explanation: 兩 (liǎng) + 張 (zhāng), the measure word for flat objects like photos.

questions.question: 我有 __________ __________ 弟弟。 (2 younger brothers)
questions.explanation: 兩 (liǎng) + 個 (ge).

questions.question: __________ __________ 很好看的日本小姐 (2 Japanese ladies)
questions.explanation: 兩 (liǎng) + 個 (ge).

questions.question: __________ __________ 漂亮的照片 (3 photos)
questions.explanation: 三 (sān) + 張 (zhāng).
